mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profile_visits (visitor_id, visited_id, visited_at) VALUES (#{visitorId}, #{visitedId}, #{visitedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.age, pv.visited_at AS visit_time FROM users u INNER JOIN profile_visits pv ON u.id = pv.visitor_id WHERE pv.visited_id = #{visitedId} ORDER BY pv.visited_at DESC
